translations.en: a huge, imposing man adorned in a leather apron.
translations.zh: 一位身形龐大、氣勢懾人、身著皮圍裙的男子。

translations.en: "Good $T, friend." He extends a huge hand which resembles a slab of meat.
translations.zh: 「$T安，朋友。」他伸出一隻狀如大塊肉排的巨手。

translations.en: "Ah!" He rumbles up to you with a large, bloody hook.
translations.zh: 「啊！」他拿著一把帶血的大鉤子大步走向汝。

translations.en: You feel like bolting, but then he drops it in a pocket on his apron and extends a bloody hand.
translations.zh: 汝幾乎想拔腿而逃，但他隨即將鉤子塞入圍裙口袋，伸出一隻帶血的手。

translations.en: He smells strongly of fish.
translations.zh: 他身上魚腥味濃烈。

translations.en: "What do ya need?"
translations.zh: 「有何需要？」

translations.en: "Yorl. A short name, but a @strong one!"
translations.zh: 「尤爾。雖是短名，卻@strong（強悍）！」

translations.en: "My @father was a coastal @raider."
translations.zh: 「我@father（父親）是個海岸@raider（劫匪）。」

translations.en: "But don't let that out."
translations.zh: 「但別說出去。」

translations.en: He lets out a holler and laughs loudly.
translations.zh: 他大聲呼喝，放聲大笑。

translations.en: He suddenly stops laughing and looks at you, his eyes angry and wide.
translations.zh: 他突然停止大笑，怒目圓睜地盯著汝。

translations.en: "Who told you?"
translations.zh: 「誰告訴汝的？」

translations.en: With that he throws his head back and laughs again.
translations.zh: 說罷他仰天大笑起來。

translations.en: "Yes, I had one." He hollers again, this time slapping you on the back.
translations.zh: 「是的，我有父親。」他又一聲大喝，這次拍了拍汝的背。

translations.en: "I'm a fisherman."
translations.zh: 「在下是個漁夫。」

translations.en: "'Tisn't quite as exciting as some jobs, but it keeps me near the @sea."
translations.zh: 「雖不比有些差事刺激，但讓我能守著@sea（大海）。」

translations.en: "Oh, aye, love the sea I do."
translations.zh: 「哦，是啊，在下愛這片大海。」

translations.en: "Even if the @fishing's been poor of late."
translations.zh: 「即便近來@fishing（漁獲）不佳。」

translations.en: "Fish come, fish go. Right now, the fish have gone."
translations.zh: 「魚來魚往，眼下魚兒都游走了。」

translations.en: "But they'll come back!"
translations.zh: 「但他們會回來的！」

translations.en: "And when they do, I'll be waitin' for 'em with my @nets!"
translations.zh: 「等他們回來，我就用@nets（漁網）在這等著！」

translations.en: "Aye, you haveta use nets to do serious fishing."
translations.zh: 「是的，正經捕魚得用網子。」

translations.en: "A @pole'll never catch you enough to sell."
translations.zh: 「用@pole（釣竿）可釣不到夠賣的量。」

translations.en: "Never use 'em myself. I stick to nets--faster and easier."
translations.zh: 「我從不用釣竿，就用網——又快又方便。」

translations.en: "Man's gotta make a living!"
translations.zh: 「人總得討生活！」

translations.en: "That's a @tale they tell in town. I've seen no spirits. Except at old Stivius'."
translations.zh: 「那是鎮上流傳的@tale（傳說）。我沒見過什麼幽靈，除了在老斯提維斯那裡喝的酒以外。」

translations.en: "You know, 'bout @Marn's pa haunting the @vineyard."
translations.zh: 「就是說@Marn（瑪妮）她父親的幽魂在@vineyard（葡萄）園徘徊那事。」

translations.en: He leans closer wiping his hands on his apron.
translations.zh: 他俯身靠近，邊說邊用圍裙擦手。

translations.en: "I think @Stivius has been drinkin' his profits."
translations.zh: 「我看@Stivius（斯提）維斯是把自己的獲利都喝進肚子裡了。」

translations.en: "I took it from Quenton's dead body to give to Marney for safe keeping."
translations.zh: 「我從昆頓的遺體上取下，好好保管地交給了瑪妮。」

translations.en: "She's the loveliest thing ever seen in these parts."
translations.zh: 「她是這一帶見過最可愛的人。」

translations.en: "I'm her father now. And if any man should want her hand, he'd better be able to take me square!"
translations.zh: 「我現在是她的父親。若有人想求她的手，最好先能跟我正面交鋒！」

translations.en: He gives you a huge grin and flexes a massive bicep.
translations.zh: 他咧嘴大笑，展示那隻碩大的手臂肌肉。

translations.en: "They say that @Quen's ghost haunts that area of town."
translations.zh: 「據說@Quen（昆）的幽靈在那一帶出沒。」

translations.en: "I can't imagine why. The sea was his lifeblood."
translations.zh: 「我不明白為何，大海才是他的命脈。」

translations.en: He removes a large hook from his pocket and begins to clean it as he talks.
translations.zh: 他從口袋裡取出一把大鉤子，邊說邊擦拭。

translations.en: "He's a strange little guy. They say he's the only one who saw Quen murdered."
translations.zh: 「怪人一個。據說他是唯一目睹昆頓遇害的人。」

translations.en: "I wish we'd had a better witness." He flips the hook over and over examining it.
translations.zh: 「要是有個更可靠的目擊者就好了。」他翻來覆去地檢視那把鉤子。

translations.en: "Still, those Gargoyles would frighten any man."
translations.zh: 「不過，魔像族確實能嚇壞任何人。」

translations.en: "'Specially one as small as him."
translations.zh: 「尤其是像他那麼矮小的人。」

translations.en: He pauses for a moment and looks distantly past your shoulder.
translations.zh: 他停頓片刻，目光越過汝的肩頭望向遠方。

translations.en: "He and I were mates. I can still remember the moment @they told me he was dead."
translations.zh: 「他和我是好夥伴。我至今記得@they（他們）告知我他已身亡的那一刻。」

translations.en: He swallows hard and his eyes become glassy. "I miss old Quen."
translations.zh: 他努力嚥了嚥口水，眼神黯淡。「我想念老昆啊。」

translations.en: "@Gideon and @Stivius."
translations.zh: 「@Gideon（吉迪）恩和@Stivius（斯提）維斯。」

translations.en: "They came to my house before dawn and told me that Quen had been killed by @gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「他們在黎明前來到我家，告訴我昆頓被@gargoyles（魔像）族殺害了。」

translations.en: "He owns the Haunting Inn. He's good people, though his @wife is a bit of a nag."
translations.zh: 「他是鬼影旅店的主人，是個好人，只是他@wife（妻子）有點嘮叨。」

translations.en: "She always complains that my house is an @eyesore."
translations.zh: 「她老嫌我的房子是個@eyesore（礙眼）之物。」

translations.en: "I tell you if she comes around here, I'll show her what an eyesore really is!"
translations.zh: 「我跟汝說，要是她來這裡，我讓她見識一下真正的礙眼！」

translations.en: He slaps you on the back and laughs.
translations.zh: 他拍了拍汝的背，大笑起來。

translations.en: "This is a fishhouse. It's meant to be an eyesore." He laughs again.
translations.zh: 「這是魚屋，本來就該是礙眼的。」他再次大笑。

translations.en: "I never seen a one."
translations.zh: 「我從未見過一隻。」

translations.en: "I seen alot o' things out at sea, @serpents as big as the biggest four-@master."
translations.zh: 「在海上見過不少奇物，有@serpents（海蛇）大得像最大的四桅@master（帆船）。」

translations.en: "But 'nary a single gargoyle." He looks out towards the sea.
translations.zh: 「但就是沒見過魔像族。」他望向大海。

translations.en: "One o' the tall ships. My father used to pilot one o' the biggest in Lord @British's fleet."
translations.zh: 「就是高桅大帆船。我父親曾駕駛不列顛@British（陛）下艦隊中最大的一艘。」

translations.en: "The Merideth @Ann. She was a sight to behold, she was."
translations.zh: 「就是『梅蕾蒂絲@Ann（安號）』，那真是一艘令人嘆為觀止的船。」

translations.en: "She'd seen many a battle with pirates. Then she went to her grave in a @storm."
translations.zh: 「她歷經無數次海盜戰役，最後在一場@storm（風暴）中沉入海底。」

translations.en: "Took nearly two hundred men with her."
translations.zh: 「帶走了近兩百名船員。」

translations.en: "Came up all of a sudden. I say it was @Mondain's doing."
translations.zh: 「那場風暴突如其來。我認為是@Mondain（蒙丹）所為。」

translations.en: He pulls the pipe from his mouth and tamps the tobacco with his stout thumb.
translations.zh: 他取下菸斗，用粗壯的大拇指壓了壓菸草。

translations.en: "Anyhow, that's when I lost my father."
translations.zh: 「總之，那便是我失去父親的時刻。」

translations.en: He stops trying to relight his pipe and looks at you.
translations.zh: 他停止重新點燃菸斗，看著汝。

translations.en: "Where have you been @scuttled? That's too long a story for this $T."
translations.zh: 「汝去哪裡@scuttled（沉船）了？這個故事說來話長，此時$T難以細說。」

translations.en: "Never mind." He sticks his hands in his apron.
translations.zh: 「不管了。」他將雙手插入圍裙。

translations.en: He turns his head back towards you, purses his lips, then speaks.
translations.zh: 他轉頭看向汝，抿了抿嘴唇，繼續說道。

translations.en: "It was a calm night, it was."
translations.zh: 「那是個平靜的夜晚。」

translations.en: "Quen and I had 'cided to go out on that glassy sea for a fish."
translations.zh: 「昆和我決定出海，去那片如鏡的海面釣魚。」

translations.en: "Not just any fish, mind ya, a @light-horn."
translations.zh: 「不是普通的魚，要釣@light（光角）魚。」

translations.en: He pulls a pipe out of his apron.
translations.zh: 他從圍裙中取出菸斗。

translations.en: "When we were boys, Quen's father often talked about such a fish."
translations.zh: 「我們還是孩子時，昆的父親常說起這種魚。」

translations.en: "Said if a body could @catch one, good fortune would be his."
translations.zh: 「他說若能@catch（捕獲）一條，必得吉祥如意。」

translations.en: He brings the pipe to his lips and lights it.
translations.zh: 他將菸斗湊到嘴邊點燃。

translations.en: "Yes, good fortune."
translations.zh: 「是的，吉祥如意。」

translations.en: "He said the fish had a glowing horn on it's snout."
translations.zh: 「他說這種魚的鼻端有一支發光的角。」

translations.en: "It only comes close to the surface when the sea is like @glass."
translations.zh: 「只有海面如@glass（鏡）時，它才會浮游近水面。」

translations.en: "You see, the fish thought the surface was a mirror and it came up to admire its horn."
translations.zh: 「汝瞧，魚以為水面是鏡子，便浮上來欣賞自己的角。」

translations.en: He chuckles to himself, teeth clenched around the pipe.
translations.zh: 他自顧竊笑，牙關咬著菸斗。

translations.en: "Anyway, Quen and I 'cided we'd catch us one in our @skiff."
translations.zh: 「總之，昆和我決定用@skiff（小船）去捕一條。」

translations.en: He pulls the pipe from his mouth and blows some smoke rings.
translations.zh: 他取下菸斗，吐出幾個煙圈。

translations.en: "Well, even though the skiff was small, we figured that we'd @spear the beast and drag it back to port."
translations.zh: 「哦，雖然小船很小，我們盤算著用魚叉@spear（刺穿）那頭大魚，再拖回港口。」

translations.en: "I know it sounds crazy now, but you have to remember, we were only boys."
translations.zh: 「我知道現在聽來很蠢，但那時我們只是孩子。」

translations.en: "Anyway, we rowed out past Ivers @Rounding and sat in our skiff waiting to see one."
translations.zh: 「總之，我們划過艾佛@Rounding（圓角），坐在小船上等候。」

translations.en: He looks out to sea again and chuckles.
translations.zh: 他再次望向大海，竊笑起來。

translations.en: "You know, past where the @alchemist lives."
translations.zh: 「就是越過那位@alchemist（鍊金）術士住所的地方。」

translations.en: "Anyway, we sat there for hours with 'nary a sign of life..."
translations.zh: 「總之，我們在那裡坐了好幾個時辰，連個動靜都沒有……」

translations.en: "Then, suddenly, in the distance we could see a tall @neck rising out of the water and heading towards us."
translations.zh: 「然後，忽然，遠處出現一根高聳的@neck（頸部）從水中升起，朝我們游來。」

translations.en: "Old Horance? He's a crazy old coot who lives on the isle."
translations.zh: 「老霍蘭斯？他是住在那座島上的瘋老頭。」

translations.en: "As it came closer, a huge wave preceded it and we could make out a giant mouth."
translations.zh: 「牠越游越近，前方掀起巨浪，我們逐漸辨出一張碩大的嘴巴。」

translations.en: He takes his pipe from his mouth and gestures at you.
translations.zh: 他取下菸斗，用它向汝比劃。

translations.en: "I tell you, you've never seen two boys make a skiff travel so fast in all your life."
translations.zh: 「我跟汝說，汝這輩子絕沒見過兩個孩子把小船划得那麼快！」

translations.en: He laughs out loud, this time bending over to support himself.
translations.zh: 他放聲大笑，這回笑得彎下腰去。

translations.en: "He's a stuffy one. Never likes to come down here, says it smells."
translations.zh: 「那傢伙一板一眼。從不肯來這裡，說這裡臭。」

translations.en: "She's a heavily rigged one, she is." He winks at you and laughs.
translations.zh: 「她是個裝備豐富的，確實如此。」他向汝眨了眨眼，笑了。
translations.note: 雙關：heavily rigged=船裝備/女性豐滿

translations.en: "I don't much care for that one. He used to be one of Mondain's henchmen."
translations.zh: 「我對那人沒什麼好感。他曾是蒙丹的爪牙。」

translations.en: "I'd plot a course 'round him if I were you."
translations.zh: 「若換了我，會繞道避開他。」

translations.en: "My father used to sail in one of his fleets. A brave and mighty ruler he is."
translations.zh: 「我父親曾在他的艦隊中效命。他是位勇猛威武的君主。」

translations.en: He slaps a hand on your back "Good fortune, and may the wind be at your back."
translations.zh: 他拍了拍汝的背。「祝汝吉祥如意，願風常伴汝身後。」

translations.en: "That doesn't concern me. Ask another."
translations.zh: 「此事與我無關，另詢他人吧。」

translator_notes: 086 Yorl: 漁夫，豪邁直率，摯友昆頓之代父形象。海蛇冒險故事精彩。spirits(幽靈/酒)雙關以意譯處理。
